title: YouTube RRmHGgO2SD8 (rerun)
thesis_bullets: This indicator measures pressure, bullish pressure versus bearish pressure.
This is one of the most powerful indicators on Trading View that can effectively help you know if the price is going to go up or down.
I will teach you a trading strategy based on this indicator.
On trading view platform here, click on indicators and search red K trader pressure index.
This one which is an editor specs indicator and written by red K trader.
This is the indicator and as you can see it is added here below the chart.
As I said this indicator measures bullish and bearish pressure in the market.
As you know in the market there is always a fight between buyers and sellers which on one hand buyers push the price up and on the other hand sellers push the price down.
So as a trader if you can determine at any given time who is in control.
So you would be able to say with high probability which direction the price is likely to go.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.
uses_indicators: and search red K trader pressure index

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when RedK Trader Pressure Index (TPX v1.0) bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on 1h bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
